author: Prestocrayon

warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: Deku was always beneath him, but the one thing he had over him was that he recognized his weaknesses. Recognized them, and looked down on him - with an outstretched hand. Exposing them for everyone to see, making him look weak. He loved to make him look weak in order to make himself look better. Holding it over his head and taunting him.So when he needed to be weak and let out his feelings, he confronted Deku. It was simple. He'd show him the weakness he loved so much and then kick his ass and show him how wrong he was to look down on him for it.

author: autumnalesque
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
tags: some of these will be very painful
i like to make my faves suffer
midoriya has the patience of a saint
summary: A collection of drabbles for various heroaca pairings. Some explicit, some not so much. Expect both ends of the spectrum here in terms of sad/happy as well, you've been warned. This will be updated as I get through more of my prompt backlog! Tags/pairings/characters will be updated accordingly. 1. Bakugou/Kirishima: "I'm here". Somewhere along the line, Katsuki loses track of time. Everything hurts, and then nothing hurts. The world has faded to silent darkness.2. Todoroki/Bakugou: "Gloves". “The fuck are you doing, half-and-half? Get on with it.” Bakugou growls, and Shouto’s lips quirk into the tiniest of smiles as he bites at loose fabric and pulls the glove off with his teeth.3. Bakugou/Midoriya: "Evidence". “You’re a real piece of fucking work, Deku,” Bakugou grumbles, a hand coming up to unconsciously cover the mark on his throat as he stomps back over and flops down on Izuku’s mattress again."4. Todoroki/Midoriya: "Puppy Love". Shouto’s childhood is mostly devoid of things as warm and bright as Midoriya Izuku, so he never forgets that face or the way it felt to have someone accept him so easily.

summary: Es impulsivo. Es incorrecto. Esto iba a rondar en los sueños de Katsuki durante semanas, meses, años. Era como tener una guillotina por encima de su cuello, estando a un hilo de cortarlo de futuro que toda su vida había imaginado. Pero Izuku estaba desesperado, lastimado, y no había nadie más que pudiera salvarlo. No había ninguna otra cosa que podía hacer. Así que Katsuki ofrece la ayuda que puede, de la única manera que sabe, por todo el tiempo que él puede soportar. Él va aferrarse a ese momento con fuerza, sabiendo que al final va romperse.Las cosas entre ellos no están destinadas a durar.

A crumb fell from the corner of his mouth.If the situation were different, Uraraka probably would’ve laughed at his utterly horrified expression.

warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
relationships: Midoriya Izuku & Yagi Toshinori | All Might
summary: Izuku is expecting the call when it comes. There have been two false alarms, so far; a call from a telemarketer, selling something with a spiel that Izuku hadn’t taken the time to really listen to; he’d hung up after a stuttered goodbye and cautiously set the phone down. The second time it sounded, about an hour later, heralded a series of texts from Uraraka-- both times had Izuku jumping at the sound of his phone buzzing, launching himself across the room to snatch it from where it was resting on the coffee-table in the living room. Both times, his mother had poked her head out of the kitchen to eye him worriedly; both times, he had given her an uneven smile and shaken his head. “Not him,” he’d mouthed, and she had nodded, and disappeared back into the kitchen. OR: slight canon divergence; Izuku visits All Might in the hospital in CH. 95.

title: Among the Ashes
author: AliFyre
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: Raised by his hero and older brother, the famous firefighter Iida Tensei, Iida Tenya has always had a bright beacon in his life inspiring him and drawing him forward. However, when Tensei is grievously injured in a fire set by a serial arsonist, his life is turned completely upside down. Suddenly his brother’s caretaker, Tenya must learn to cope with a slew of new responsibilities and find a new place to lean on in his time of hardship. Being unable to rely on his brother for emotional support, he must find other ways to cope with the drastic changes in his life -- something which Midoriya Izuku is all too happy to help with. Meanwhile, the fires in the city keep burning, reminding him every day of the pain his brother is suffering -- and his own desire for revenge.

summary: Knees to the floor, no matter how hard he tried to get back on his feet his legs wouldn't move, not in the other's presence. His body wanted him on the floor, his body wanted him to open his mouth and beg, that wasn't him at all. That wasn't who Bakugou was, he wouldn't put his face to the floor for anyone.Of all the people to force him to his knees, Midoriya was possibly the last person in the universe he'd ever want to do that for. The thought alone that the other was an alpha was surprising, maybe if he had the presence of mind to examine his interactions with Midoriya he might have been kicking himself, it wasn't like he cared it just seemed to him that the universe was working against him somehow.He'd had a very long string of luck, now it seemed that he'd finally run out.

tags: The drinks are just punch I swear
A look inside the mind of Bakugou Katsuki
summary:
Bakugou ends up going to one of their middle school’s annual dances. Needless to say, he spends his time leaning against one of the back walls and watching the endless lights flash from afar.However, when he happens to catch sight of a certain green-haired boy, the night takes a bit of a turn.
  The very moment my eyes locked onto him, I couldn’t tear myself away. I fucking hate him. Everything he does drives me absolutely insane. Yet, when I see him laughing and dancing in the flashing lights, the part of me I want to deny refuses to let me leave.

title: Stick The Landing.
author: theweakestthing
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
tags: a whole load of fluff for you
summary: Bakugou stared at the now gaping hole in his ceiling, blinked several times before his eyes trailed down to the pile of debris in the middle of the room."What the fuck?" Bakugou whispered, brows knitted, "what the fuck!" He yelled, shaking vigorously with rage.The pile of debris shifted and moved, giving way to something that looked suspiciously like a body. Fluffy green hair appeared from the rubble along with the rest of a very naked man that didn't have a single scratch on their body apart from something on the man's back, it was completely absurd, utterly absolutely completely absurd. The man turned toward him, smiled wide and moved slowly from the debris, ceiling tiles and splintered wood moving around the man's legs and feet."Kacchan," the man said, smile wide and kinda scary."What?" Bakugou barked, taking a step back, really though what the hell was happening.

summary: “What really, is the job of a hero? To prevent crime? To protect civilians? To stop villains?”Shinsou nodded hesitantly, unsure where he was going with this. “All of that, and more.”Midoriya looked at him, almost pityingly. “Don’t you think there’s a paradox there? Where do you draw the line between ‘villain’ and ‘civilian’? When you’re labelled as a villain, just because your ideals don’t align with that of this society, but you haven’t committed any evil – isn’t it just as terrible to hurt them for the sake of being a ‘hero’? Aren’t heroes supposed to exist to protect?”Shinsou’s blood ran cold. He was sure he knew what this was about.

summary: “I already told you,” he said steadily, “I’m leaving for good. As of today, I’m resigning as a Pro Hero.”Bakugou laughed. “You’ve got to be kidding me – you, resigning? Best joke I’ve heard in years.”But for someone who really knew Bakugou, they’d be able to hear the hint of fear he was trying to hide behind those cruel words.And for someone who really knew Midoriya, they’d be able to see it in his eyes that he was dead serious.And they really did know each other that well, too well for people who’d never really looked like they got along. And to the extent, to be able to pick up on the emotions that they’d tried so hard to lock away and it was then that something broke between them, something irreversible and Bakugou knew he couldn’t keep this up any longer.

The Coastal Wall is a fool’s errand. Jaegers are our best option. It’d be great if we could pit the kaiju against each other and watch them tear each other limb from limb, but that’s not happening any time soon.”He gets the usual nods and murmurs of agreement from the gathered PPDC executives—Marshals, Rangers, LOCCENT Mission Controllers, the lot. They each sip their drinks, men and women at their wit’s end. Then there’s a pause, a moment to turn over Aizawa’s words, and then, they start thinking.   (or, the pacific rim au in which the PPDC decides to fight like with like, and all the kids get a little on the scaly side)

summary: Iida likes to think of himself as a man of plans – they help to keep everything clear and organised. Even so, one of the most important things that the three years spent at Yuuei taught him is that plans often tend to crash and burn in the face of unpredictable factors. What Iida isn’t used to, though, is shooting himself in the foot – and that’s precisely what he’s doing now, standing just outside a school gate, with Midoriya looking expectantly at him. Sunlight is catching in his hair and there are cherry petals falling to the ground all around them.It’s all so not helping the situation. Iida wants to shake his past self for thinking it’d be a good idea to choose today to do this.

After that, they collectively sigh.“You mean Todoroki and Midoriya?” Yaoyorozu asks at the same time as Kirishima says, “Midoriya and Iida are oblivious,” and Hagakure mutters, “Iida-kun and Todoroki-kun, huh.”They gape at each other, shocked, before turning to look at the three in question again, standing by Todoroki’s desk and simply talking. There’s a moment of awkward silence.“That’s…” Yaoyorozu starts, unsure.Uraraka nods, as if satisfied. “My point exactly.”

title: You and Me
author: OwlWanderer
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: The smell of pizza and beer was suddenly lost in Izuku’s smell. He smelt like sweat, iron, soap and grass, all at the same time, intoxicating as poison. He watched Deku move his head to the rhythm of the song, moving from one side to the other, while lowering himself and then moving up again. Shouto stood back, ate the pizza and looked at him. Looked at the movements as if they weren’t just made by a drunken mind following the beat of alternative rock, while poorly whispering phrases in English he couldn’t pronounce quite right. And then green beautiful sparking eyes locked at his, in a dazed look and with a goofy smile.	Time stood still between them. “Hi.” He said.	“Go solo with me.”

It’s happiness that he thinks can’t get any better until the moment it does on one particular lazy morning in bed...."Todoroki gazed at him with the depth of someone trying to commit that face with the softly angled jawline and freckled cheeks to memory, as if he didn't already have every aspect of Midoriya filed away into the treasured corners of his mind. But that didn't stop him from retracing those countless freckles to map out miniature constellations; from following the many swoops of wild hair that sprang out every which way; from scanning over the many scars, most faded, that streaked across his skin. He drank in every bit of his features that he could with his gaze, burning them even more into his memory."

summary: Todoroki has learned from a young age not to cherish anything. Such inane feelings would only lead to pain on his part. Teddy bears going black where flame consumed them, boiling water, and the way gossip could burn fingerprints into your thoughts, all taught him well. Possessions are fragile and human affection is fleeting.But recently something has ignited inside of him, and no amount of cool rational can seem to dissuade his heart from leaking into this head. It appears Izuku Midoriya has personally set out on a mission to deconstruct years of careful mental and emotional blocks.

summary: The third time, she walked in on them wrestling, thought it was normal and went to retrieve her school uniform, when wrestling turned into wrestling, lewd noises and jerking hips included.The fourth time, she was resting at the infirmary when they both got brought in. Seeing as they were already half-naked, little time is wasted before things get steamy in the messy, fumbling teenage way.By the fifth time, Tooru is wondering if she should get herself a kitty bell.She thought Bakugou wanted to beat Todoroki up, because Bakugou wanted to beat everyone up. And that Todoroki was just kind of staying away from Bakugou in the same way people stayed away from tempests, or forest fires.Hagakure Tooru is invisible, and that is sometimes a lot more trouble than it's worth.

summary: Yamada Hizashi is doing exactly what he's always wanted to do with his life—running his own preschool and daycare. Even though it's small, it's his and he knows he's good at what he does. Then, Aizawa Shouta, an underground pro hero, enrolls his adoptive son, four year-old Shinsou Hitoshi, a boy who's been kicked out of every other daycare and school he's been put in since the development of his brainwashing quirk. Hizashi is more than happy to have him in his school, especially since Hizashi was born with a 'dangerous' quirk himself, and he quickly finds out that he has a soft spot for this kid and a serious liking towards his father that he has to learn to deal with.

summary: “What kind of Quirk do you think our kid could end up with?”They’re relaxing on their couch after a day of patrols and public appearances when Ochako brings up the subject. Having a child had been an on and off topic between the two of them. They both knew the very real chance that one or both of them wouldn’t come back from their jobs some day, and they were unsure if they could burden a child like that. Both had seen what it could do to a kid with Kouta. But that didn’t stop speculation to pop up periodically.“Well, kids usually inherit their parent’s quirks,” Izuku starts thoughtfully, “so there’s a good chance they could end up just like you, and remove gravity from an object by touching it.”“They could also end up like you.”

summary: If he unpacks it enough, he thinks there could be something warm, something that feels suspiciously like fucking affection lurking underneath all of his concern; but he himself knows that most of this, if not all, is probably because he thinks it would be such a shame to let such a lovely face fall to ruin and get dirtied by the streets of Musutafu.At least, that’s what he likes to tell himself.

title: A Noble Pursuit
author: MaiaMizuhara
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
tags: Alternate Universe - No Quirks (My Hero Academia)
I Wrote This Instead of Sleeping
summary: Are people defined by a prescripted fate, or rather by the choices they make?Izuku awakens one day void of memories in a foreign place; the only recollection he seemed to have was a lucid dream and a name – Katsuki. He is later found by the prince of a country involved in a vengeful war and becomes the head tactician of his arm, where everyone’s lives are given for him to use as he pleases. He can’t afford to make a single mistake, because one wrong move could be the end for all of them.And now – as he has to deal with his quick growing feelings for said prince –, his past is catching up to him. Events are revealed and stories are rediscovered, stocking up all for one last grand finale.

title: Silver Lining
author: AnonymusAxolotl
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: "If I had wanted to be scolded, I'd have stayed there, Midoriya."He felt Izuku going rigid besides him. He hadn't called him anything but his given name for a year now. Midoriya felt as alien to Izuku's ears now as it felt to Shouto's lips."I'm sorry, I just-" he stopped there for a moment, and Shouto finally had it in him to look back at Izuku- "I hate this, alright? I hate that he does this to you, every single time. It hurts when you come back, bloody and battered, wincing at every breath, hissing at every touch, jumping at the smallest noise- it isn't right." Shouto stumbles onto the Midoriya Household after a particularly horrible night back at home.

Death Note (Anime & Manga)
tags: You don't need to watch or read Death Note to read this
summary:
After Bakugou carelessly threw Izuku's hero journal out the classroom window, it was only natural that Izuku would search for it. Except that he doesn't find his journal, instead, he finds another notebook that really just seems like a joke at first.
'The human whose name is written in this note shall die,' was the first rule written inside this notebook.
When a dire situation rears its ugly head, Izuku is forced to use it because, in spite of the chances of how this shouldn't even work, he had no choice other than to hope that everything would turn out alright when he couldn't do anything to help. Or so he'll later tell himself to ease the guilt when the notebook actually works.

summary:
***There was a legend passed along the Dracnesse royal bloodline.
  If you wear a thin, all black outfit and you stare across the wide expanse of dark sea and sky at 12 midnight along the rocky boulders just behind the castle cliff, a bright blue light will appear. Along with it a grand, silver ship will emerge from the white fog. There, the legendary Pirate King can grant you any wish in exchange for a pure, gold ring with ancient writings engraved into it.

  Prince Izuku of Dracnesse was forced to try the ritual by his cousins one night. All dressed up and abandoned beneath the rocky cliffside, Izuku awaits for dawn to come.. 

  
    ...What the prince didn’t expect was the legend becoming true.

summary: People change; feelings change.The distance that had grown between them was as wide as the line breaks in the letters they used to communicate, years of unspoken words hidden in-between the white spaces."What if I told you I like you?" she says slowly.He laughs, but it doesn't quite reach his eyes. There's a kind but pensive air around him."That's a funny joke," the boy remarks without a hint of amusement. His fingers curl around each other in his lap. She wonders if he knows how tight of a hold he has on her heart. "But we're not kids anymore, Uraraka-san."And that was that.

fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: It should have ended with the usual malicious eye contact. Why anyone would put Todoroki and Bakugou in the same changing room was beyond them. Yuuei is lucky that they both were gunning for top of the class and the school. If either of them lost sight of that goal and let their pride swallow them, they’d probably demolish half the school before anyone could break up their fight. They are two incompatible halves — quiet, shouldering disdain and a wildfire — never meant to come together. And yet.Something snaps that day, and now the two of them are on each other like a swarm of bees, all teeth and tongue and desperate hands. It is a new way of fighting — a grab for a different kind of power.

title: 'Til Our Mouths Run Dry
author: scout_1910
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: Shinsō Hitoshi, forty-one years old, is not exactly an upstanding member of society. Still, he does his job and does it damn well. He lives in a decent apartment with his three cats, and keeps more or less to himself. Then he runs into Aizawa Shōta and all the energy of his awkward high-school crush comes rushing back, never mind the fact that it’s been twenty-three years since graduation. But time has brought change; Aizawa now is not the same as he was then. Shinsō finds himself drawn to the tired lines of Aizawa’s body each time they meet, and the quiet arguments they keep having over dinner. He kind of wants to take him home. It’s kind of a problem.

summary: It would probably take Midoriya days to list the things he admired about Bakugou. His definition of victory, one of the greatest hero proteges he’d ever heard of, a glorious talent on the battlefield, of course. Beyond the public reasons, which everyone at Yuuei acknowledged, however reluctantly, Midoriya also loved the smaller things about Bakugou -- the tender way he smoothed his hands over his bed after it was made, the internal pep-talk he gave himself every morning in the mirror as he checked himself from all angles, the quiet, strained look he made when he actually managed to stop himself from speaking out of turn. Midoriya loved Bakugou’s diligence, his confidence, his self-assuredness.He yearned the latter. ----Midoriya yearns for the self-confidence Bakugou has with his body, his gender, and Bakugou is trying, trying to help him.

summary: Short Fics written for EraserMightWeek 2017.#4 Trust/ Hope: Trustfalls, plus ultra. To be fair, not even the villains knew about the bomb. And staking out an observation spot on the roof was at one point a very sensible idea.#5 Safety/ Comfort: Toshinori isn't about to leave Shōta with some deranged, human-experiment-committing, destructive-quirk-wielding yakuza guy. No, even if he's not exactly All Might anymore, he's going to do something. Cue undercover mission.#6 Peace/ Home: When the heroes return from their fight with Chisaki, Toshinori is relieved. For once Midoriya appears fine, if shaken. Then Aizawa relates what occurred, and in the process Toshinori also discovers Aizawa isn't as fine as he seems either. (Coda for 159)#7 AU: On the anniversary of his coronation, the All Might Emperor, Yagi Toshinori, is nearly assassinated.#8 Free Day: Caught in a snowstorm. While chaperoning a school trip, Aizawa and Yagi get caught in a snowstorm.

summary: Several cars drove past him, but none of them stopped to help him. Todoroki was just about to give up completely, when the dirtiest pickup truck he had ever seen pulled up behind his car. An equally dirty man climbed out of the truck, “Oi, dumbass, what happened?” Todoroki took in the appearance of the man in front of him. Blonde hair stuck out at unnatural angles, but his bangs were plastered to his forehead. Intense red eyes burned a hole into Todoroki. He was shirtless, a red flannel was tied around his waist. His chest gleamed with a thin layer of sweat. The blonde waved a gloved hand in front of his face, “Earth to City Boy. Did you break a nail or something?”Todoroki shook his head, “My car started smoking, so I pulled over.”

author: jonphaedrus
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
relationships: Aizawa Shouta | Eraserhead/Yagi Toshinori | All Might
summary: The minute there had been more than one hero on television, there had been hero pornos. And they had only exponentially multiplied when the internet had developed, because the creators had easy access to an audience of everyone and didn’t need an actual budget. And then All Might had happened, and the industry had exploded. Movies. Videos. Sex hotlines. Sex roleplay chats. Entire fucking sections of RPF fanfic on LoveJournal, DreamtLength, the Pit of Wasps before it banned explicit fanfic, GeodeCities, SolidFic, Rumblr, and Archive of Their Own were just the mainstreams. Zines, printed fanfic, novels, self-published erotica for sale on internet publishing sites…the pit went as deep as you wanted it to.

summary: Even in a world of quirks and heroes and villains, the supernatural lingered. They were getting noisier as of late, blending in and pretending their abilities were quirks. In a sick and twisted sort of way, Eva "Kay" Alcala supposed that was a good thing. It meant she still had a job. That's all she needed was a job, something to keep a roof over her head and put her niece Maria through school- Maria wanted to be a pro hero when she grew up, and Eva would be damned if that wasn't going to happen.All Eva had to do was work with the local police and whatever pro heroes she could get to believe her to keep the streets safe, to keep Maria safe, to keep herself safe. To keep the demons who chased her out of her old life locked in dusty boxes, never to see the light of day. And in case those demons came back, all Eva had to do was not form attachments to any thing, any cause, any person.Especially the cute but grumpy neighbor.

relationships: Other Relationship Tags to Be Added
characters: Other Character Tags to Be Added
summary: At the peak of things, this should not be normal, at least not for class 1-A of U.A High. Normal for them meant everything from villain attacks to drastic changes in their school life by their teachers or just the public in general. But for Izuku Midoriya, that feeling is drastically changed as he blacks out and wakes up on a school bench, in an unknown classroom, whose windows have been sealed tight with metal plates, with no escape according to the white and black colored teddy bear.The day itself have been eventful for the newly appointed principal of Hope’s Peak; Makoto Naegi. He have just finished the rebuilding of the old building that once housed the Mutual killing game of class 78 that occurred four years ago. But as he is about to reach his end goal, he is thrown into a strange location, where no despair and hope is in focus, but rather supernatural phenomenoms known as "Quirks" is part of their society.Follow Midoriya and Naegi as they suddenly swap places with each other, with their memories intact from their original worlds, as they try to navigate through their own stories, not knowing what is about to happen to their friends and loved ones, who have no recollection of their original worlds.

He tries his best to keep the team together and tries his best to avoid colliding with the other emergency services as they turn up. But there's a weird unspoken thing between him and one of his team mates, and while ignoring it has worked thus far, it's only a matter of time before it explodes to the surface. It's gonna be a bumpy - but incredibly amusing - ride.

warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: HEED THE TAGS ! read only when you feel comfortable The first email shows up two weeks into his summer vacation. He can’t remember the title or what was written beyond the line ‘no one wants an evil cop’ and the video of him dunking Deku’s face into pond of their middle school. He deleted the email but the message kept itching in the back of his head. And it becomes a problem after the fifth video. Deku is crying begging for him to stop and he keeps going, beats the boy into a pulp and he’s grinning. A true cop wouldn’t do this, would be a shame if people found out that you are such a horrible person.Everyone at their Middle school knew Katsuki wanted to become the worlds best detective, only the best thrive after all. It starts with money. It doesn't end there.

summary: The joke nearly falls flat, but the Todoroki begins to laugh and Uraraka grins. “I made you laugh!”“You did.”“I thought only Deku-kun could do that!”Todoroki’s smile instantly drops. He hates that it drops. The mention of Midoriya should make him grin even wider, but now it’s all so jaded… and whose fault is that? Uraraka is looking at him with a concerned gaze and he lowers his head, hoping his fringe will hide away whatever she thinks she sees. It doesn't work. “Deku-kun and Bakugou are a real surprise, huh?” Her voice is soft, like she's scared it'll break him.Yeah, he thinks, a real surprise indeed.

summary: I never had a name for them. No one had one either. They're just them. None of us know why they hunt us down or what their reason is. They just do. It doesn't makes sense but that's how it is, we never questioned how our cycle works. They always find us, it isn't weird after a few times. Our theory is that they get notifications when a text is send, or a location. We are always watched by them and no matter what, we cannot get out of under their thumb. They're always there, watching, hunting.

summary: “If there isn’t any action though, I’m going to fall asleep watching.” Katsuki pouted over his shoulder.  Izuku let out a little sigh, but smiled.  They had really come a long way over the past 17 years, going from childhood friends, to bully and bullied, to rivals, and finally back to friends.  He felt that now they were probably the closest they’ve ever been in their turbulent friendship. They were a perfect team.A perfect team that Izuku would fight tooth and nail to keep now that he finally had it.  He wouldn’t risk anything destroying this precious peace they finally had, including his own feelings.  He had resigned himself years ago to a quiet, one sided love.  Because the truth was, since they were four years old, Izuku Midoriya has loved Katsuki Bakugou.  ORThese dorks have movie night and sleep talk.

title: Fire And Ice
author: KaseyBeth
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: The teenager shook his head as his father’s voice echoed through his mind. He was having a hard time concentrating and an even harder time trying to remember why he was here in the first place... One more hour. He had to get through one more hour… then he could go back to the dorms and sleep. His body pulsed with overheated pain that burned his skin and made his head spin with every movement. He really wanted to sleep. He wanted to lie down. Standing was beginning to get difficult, and the heat that swallowed his whole body was making it hard to concentrate properly...

title: This is Me.
author: Tobsana
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: Clinical bipolar depression is a mental health condition that causes extreme mood swings that include emotional highs and lows. No one is ever excluded in physical or mental diseases, sometimes there is a reason, and sometimes it is unexplainable and unfair, but it just simply happens. Kirishima has accepted this since the beginning but when people he finds most close with are pushing him to get well, he starts to realize there was nothing wrong with him in the end, that it was just who he was. That this depression, was also part of who he is.

summary: Inasa was the kind of boy you couldn't ignore. It wasn't usually a problem for Katsuki, who could shut most anyone up with a well-timed explosion, but since that was the kind of behavior that landed him in the special course in the first place, he had to try something else. Preferably something not as violent.Less than a minute of stepping into the classroom-- a basement conference room in the Hero Public Safety Commission building-- he found the asshole towering over the other students in class, chest puffed out like an idiot, hands on his hips and howling with laughter at some joke he probably made himself, and Katsuki knew he needed to draw on a deeper well of patience than he possessed to last a full day without starting a fight.Less than two minutes in, it became clear he wouldn't need to.     "GOOD MORNING, TODOROKI-KUN."In which Katsuki has a revelation about his special course classmates and Kirishima's just along for storytelling hour.

tags: Seeing your soulmate allows you to see color
summary: Katsuki first sees colors bloom when he is only three years old. It is timid Izuku, hiding behind the cover of his mother's leg who looks upon him with wide eyes, and Katsuki's world explodes in shades of greens and pinks and blues, and he is so startled, he begins to cry.His life is then on defined in color, in shades his peers can't see, by the forlorn, timid stare in Izuku's eyes that always lets off more than he is willing to tell. There is a schism driven between himself and his fated other, and Katsuki strives to be better than fate, better than what is defined for him. He is more than the written pages of a book, to be cracked open and read by the gods.He wonders if it is possible for colors to bloom for someone who will never love you back.

When he continued his voice was bitter, and almost sad. “I’m bound to you. I am going to steal your breath from you, because that’s the only way for me to be free. summary: I set out to write some tododeku and this happened. Todoroki decides to try talking to a therapist and asks Izuku to come along. You don't have shit to do with letting people know they've made the team.”Kirishima blushed, and buried his face in his hands with a groan. “Okay, shit, fine. I just wanted his number. But you guys don't understand, we totally had a moment when he gave me the flowers last month!”“A moment…” Kaminari repeated, flinging his lollipop stick onto the ground. “Sure.”_Bakugou Katsuki and Kirishima Eijirou are two sides of the same, beat up coin. Hears the silent “With someone I shouldn’t have,” not in words, but in the way Izuku’s smile falters a little too much and the way his shoulders hunch over. title: One of You
author: orphan_account
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
tags: Bakugou Katsuki is Bad at Feelings
summary: When you hear the word “special” or “unique” what is the first thing you think of? Some might say themselves, the place they live or the people around them, or even something like the weather that day. In another world, Midoriya Izuku desired to be this above all else. To be able to be a well-loved hero with a cool quirk to protect everyone with. But in this world, he wished nothing but to be like the other, hidden, unknown, quirkless.In this world, Midoriya Izuku is what many people would consider “Unique”. You see Izuku had a secret. While he had the power to protect, he would not have anyone to protect being the monster he is.

title: you have nothing to hide from me
author: QueerPinoy
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: Midoriya Izuku is ashamed of who he is. Who… they are? Who she is? He’s still not sure but he sure as hell doesn’t want to think about it right now. He pushes his femininity away like it’s a shameful thing, something to stay hidden, keep to himself. Sometimes he slips, lets a gesture through. Once he even painted his nails and kept them on for a whole day -- black, an acceptable nail color for a boy going through his teenage angst. But this, the Izuku, he saw looking at himself in the dress he had mail-ordered, is his secret. The dress doesn’t quit him quite right -- it drapes where it should be tight, falls too low on his torso, but it’s still precious and he still grins a stilted smile when he looks at himself in the mirror. No one would ever know about this dress. No one would ever know how he felt.Bakugou Katsuki is the opposite. He could probably be stealth if he wasn’t so bombastic about who he is. He doesn’t even whisper it, doesn’t just tell his friends -- he yells it out. “How the fuck am I more of a fuckin’ man than you?” “I’ve got more balls than you without even fucking having any!” He never bothers hiding. He has no shame. Izuku yearns to know what that’s like.

title: Pyrrhic victory
author: A_Normal_User
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
tags: I swear i will try to translate this...someday
summary: Dormimos y soñamos sobre héroes y villanos. Sobre victorias y derrotas, justicia y malevolencia...pero hace mucho que el mundo no se mancha realmente las manos. La gente observa el mundo de los héroes sin ver más allá, cegados por el resplandor...como yo hacía hace mucho, cuando quería ser un héroe. Estaba tan cegado que ignoraba las amargas lágrimas de mi madre, las quemaduras en mi piel y el sufrimiento en general...y cuando la luz se apago, como si de una presa se tratase, esos sentimientos acabaron ahogándome. Este mundo merece mas...merece volver a levantarse sobre sus hombros y gritar al mundo la verdad sobre quienes somos y adonde vamos... Y yo prometo que les haré verlo.

title: Give Me Your Hand And Rip Out My Heart
author: Kobias
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
relationships: Aizawa Shouta | Eraserhead/Yamada Hizashi | Present Mic
tags: in all honesty everything from chapter 7 and before is setting up for the big plot

summary: Midoriya had known that Bakugou had only been trying to get a rise out of him when he told him to jump off the roof, but that didn't stop him. It didn't stop him from hitting the pavement with a sickening thud, and it didn't stop him from hurting until it felt like his brain would melt away.But he had lived.And as he trudged home, carrying the wounds of his suicide attempt, he was ambushed by a villain who meant to kill him and steal his body. He had felt the cold hands of death at his throat while he drowned, no hero coming until it was too late.And yet he still lived.Midoriya Izuku knew there were only so many things in this world that could be explained with quirks, and none of them even applied to him, a weak quirkless kid. But he had survived near death twice, and even heroes with years of experience under the belt were disabled from a single experience, let alone walking away from one right after the other.He begins to realize that the world isn't what he had dreamed it to be and the shimmering hope of heroism was only a mask to cover the ugly truth of life. After all, heroes aren't the only things in the world.

title: Speed
author: Rich_Ramblings
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
tags: Boku no Hero Academia Future Fic
summary: Katsuki has always been wicked fast, and I guess I’ve always been sorta jealous of that. It’s way cool, you know? And super manly, being able to just jump into action and not worry about what’s going to happen. I’m too scared to do that most of the time, too worried I’ll mess up and people will get hurt. He’ll get hurt. He tries to tell me that that’s me being reasonable and level headed but sometimes, when I’m lying awake at night and thinking over the day’s work, I think a little bit of that caution comes a touch too close to fear. It’s not that I’m a stranger to fear, far from it, actually. But courage, yeah listen to this I heard someone say it once, courage isn’t the lack of fear, it’s recognizing that sometimes things are more important than fear. Isn’t that awesome? I think so at least. I wonder if Katsuki feels the same way. He probably doesn’t, knowing him. I’ll bet he never feels scared like I do. Or maybe...Maybe just that one time. I think I saw fear that one time. But I think, usually, he’s moving too fast for the intrusive thoughts to catch up with him.

summary: "Sometimes, I think of the sun and moon as lovers who rarely meet,always chase, and almost always miss each other.But once in a while, they do catch up, and they kiss,and the world stared in awe of their eclipse."________________________________________________"You know something." Kurai spoke into the silence of the dark room. The only light being cast by the streetlights throwing an orange glow on to the side of his face. But they didn't reach past him. Keeping her in the dark. "you're like the sun to me.""Huh?" Kirishima frowned, opening eyes from where he'd been drifting off to sleep. "You're warm and bright. Your smile could make flowers grow." she whispered "yet I'm the Moon, left behind -unable to glow without the help of the sun.""But the moon is beautiful." he said softly. His features pulled into a frown and still a little sleepy.She gave him a weak smile "It may be. But it's alone, a tiny rock of dust suspended in space. Every now and then catching a glimpse of that beautiful sun that makes her gleam." Kurai gave a shuddering breath "you're the sun to me."

summary: And during this time, what is labelled the Age Of Heros, is where the times start to change again.  Where a boy, one born quirkless, weak, useless, fights back, show the world who he is.Where a boy who is bred to be strong, shows a strength of standing up for what’s right, even if it means fighting against his father.Where a boy who grew into a man just wants to smile through all of the pain, make others smile through the pain.Where a mother just want to keep her son from experiencing that pain.And where a class, an entire school, gets caught up in the heat of the world relearning a lesson long forgotten._____________________________________________________________________________Or where the world is black, white, and grey until you meet your soulmate.  When you meet them, the color slowly comes to your world until your relationship with them is solidified, which is when the world is the full double rainbow it was meant to be.  All other general soulmate au rules apply (the pull to that person, ability to get along pretty easily, ect.  Also I suck at summaries so I'm really sorry)  (Babu Izu notes will explain better)

summary: Most of Bakugou’s life was a tightly wound, everything-in-its-place, only the best, nothing better that he protected viciously. He knew what he wanted, how hard he would have to work to get it, and when. The intrusions, the unwanted complications, felt like yanking a comb through knotted hair and getting stuck. So he broke through, endured the pain, and moved on. He would get to the top not because it was a given, but because he earned it, no wiggle room, no doubts allowed. Did he recognize how this turned him into a bundle of nerves, that his aggression was a wall not only meant to stop others from getting too close, but also to protect himself from any reason to pause? Likely not, but that didn’t stop him from turning into a bundle of nerves, from taking his frustration out on others and on himself. He felt like scar tissue, pulling together a wound. He felt tangled.Except.Except here, kneeling in front of his lover, his hands and forearms secured behind his back in a tight bind, letting his pride roll down his back in beads of sweat, letting go of control, this is what Midoriya was for.

title: The Mermaid Prince
author: KristaLynn
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: “You shouldn't be going up to the surface! Your father will have your tail on a plate if he found out you were doing this!” Izuku the crab shouted. The blonde merman pretended not to listen. Ever since he was a child, Denki had always been told not to go above the sea. The nasty humans could catch him and eat him. He never took anything his father told him seriously. He was always fascinated by the items that dropped into the ocean, and often took some of them home.  He was good at hiding his treasures.	“Dad never said I couldn’t listen to the stories the humans tell.” Denki told his crab friend. “I saw a ship hit the land a few minutes ago. I’m sure that there’s something I haven't heard yet!” He swam over to the boat, and quietly listened to the tales the sailors told. Denki got closer to the boat when he couldn't hear. Izuku almost had a heart attack.

title: Wasted Opportunities
author: orphan_account
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: They say opportunities come and go. Sometimes, people let opportunities pass, because they believe that that particular opportunity has no impact, no meaning to them. It will not impact their lives in any positive way, so they let it pass them by, and move on.Sometimes, people let opportunities pass them by because they are complacent, or waited too long. By the time they act, it might be too late. The opportunity had long gone, leaving them with nothing but pain, regret, and self-loathing.But sometimes, people want to catch onto an opportunity, but they aren’t able to. Perhaps it is beyond their abilities, or somebody else took it faster than they did. Who knows?-Midoriya dies after leaping off his school rooftop. Bakugou is left to pick up the pieces. Yet from beyond the grave, Midoriya reaches out to his childhood friend, giving him a chance to start anew.

summary: "If it's too much to bear alone, you can always ask for help. No one would think any less of you." Toshi's eyes light up a little but he doesn't say anything. For years he's wished to have someone to confide in, but the burden that he bore had been entrusted to him. They were secrets that had to kept between a select few. But besides all that, he didn't want to burden another because of what he'd chosen to take on.After his last act as a hero, All Might is forced into retirement. Unable to fight. Unable to protect anyone. How does one continue to carry certain burdens when they no longer have the strength to do so anymore? Can the man who's always had criticizing opinions about the No. 1 hero show him that it's okay to ask for help?Starts post chapter 95 of manga. Follows canon with some divergence.

title: Black, I Don't Have All Day!
author: HG_Wells
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
tags: Midoriya works at a coffee shop
summary: On your 16th birthday words are imprinted on to your arm, they are known as 'The Words of Love'. These words are the first words your Soulmate will say to you in their own handwriting. A 18 year old Izuku Midoriya has never gone out in search of his Soulmate, he chose to continue and work at the coffee shop he's lived at since the untimely death of his Mother and the newfound news that he is the son of Toshinori Yagi (aka All Might) who will one day pass his Quirk down to him. Though the only thing Izuku is concerned about right now is having the money to pay for his Father's next surgery.A 19  year old Bakugou Katsuki has trained most of his life to become a Hero, and his training paid off. He wasn't a sidekick for very long, quickly moving up the ranks. He arrived at #2 Hero when he was 19, but after the retirement of All Might who suddenly seemed to disappear off the map, he rose to #1 and has yet to give up that place. He's never been interested in the concept of Soulmates and refuses to search for his own, thinking they'd just drag him down. But one day, both of their lives will take a b-line in the same direction and they'll have to face it head on.

summary: [The original story -- abandoned in favor of updated version]The “Izuku is a witch who was practically raised by werewolves” AU that no one asked for.Starring: A supernatural world hidden from quirk society. Izuku’s a confused cinnamon roll with no social graces other than those learned from werewolves. Bakugou wants to be alpha of the class pack, Sero thinks Bakugou’s too controlling, and Kirishima just wants everyone to be friends. Todoroki tries to not have a coronary when Izuku appears by his bed at night, Tokoyami teaches Izuku how to meditate, Iida has to give Izuku Sex Ed... and basically, no one has any idea what they’re doing at any point in time.Except Aizawa. Their “pack leader.”Oh wait. Izuku keeps getting Aizawa to pet his head in front of other faculty members and has definitely slept at the foot of Aizawa’s bed.So... scratch that. Not even Aizawa.

summary: Todoroki hates his scar. All it has given him are memories of a mother who's always crying and a childhood lost to grueling years of training. It mars his skin, a painful reminder that he is his father's son. On some days, he loses himself. But when that happens, there's always a certain someone there to remind him that his power is not his father's, nor even his mother's. It is his own. And even if he still hates the burn discoloring his face, he knows that his scar is healing.  In order words, the five times Todoroki Shouto let a certain someone touch his scar and the one time that someone let him do the same.

title: Welcome
author: eerieryoko
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
tags: Alternate Universe - Ouran High School Host Club
Dabi and Todoroki Shouto Are Siblings
summary:
“Pay. Fucking. Attention.” Bakugou comes closer with each word until their noses are nearly touching. There's that familiar glint to Bakugou’s eyes again, the one that Kirishima had previously misjudged as jealousy. But it didn’t make sense last time, and it doesn’t make sense now so he brushes it off.

  He wants to tell Bakugou there’s no way he could pay attention to anyone or anything else when he’s around, but thankfully Bakugou leans back and continues talking before Kirishima can embarrass himself any further.
xxKirishima has no idea what the fuck he's doing when he accidentally joins Yuuei's Host Club, but he's gonna have a lot of fun along the way.

tags: Bonding Over Hating The Hero Society
summary: Chisaki Kai acreditava que o mundo estava doente. Protegido pela sua máscara, ele buscava destruir e reconstruir a sociedade pela base do mal que a assolava - os poderes que corriam no sangue de cada um, incluindo o dele mesmo.Shigaraki Tomura odiava super-heróis e queria corroer a sociedade até que esta virasse pó usando suas mãos. Em uma fatídica noite, seu caminho se cruza com o de Chisaki, e os dois vilões passam a criar um laço forjado por suas similaridades e desejo de mudar o mundo.O maior problema era que ambos pertenciam a organizações diferentes, não usavam as mesmas máscaras. Ainda assim, aquilo não impediu que novos sentimentos tomassem conta de seus corações, afligindo-os como uma doença cujo único remédio era a companhia um do outro.No entanto, um remédio não é sinônimo de cura, e Chisaki e Shigaraki não podiam se curar sem antes um destruir o outro primeiro.

summary: Towards the end of the last lesson, Eijirou’s phone vibrated. Pulling it out, he noticed he had a message. His eyes widened when he saw who it was from: Mina Ashido. “Hey buddy!” It read, “I'm sick as hell.”Attached was a photo of Mina in pajama pants and a t-shirt with cursive writing on it, sitting cross-legged in front of her mirror. Tuffs of her hair around her face were tied up in small bunches. Her nose was red and her cheeks were flushed and, although it was hard to tell because of her black scleras, her eyes seemed a little irritated.Eijirou blushed a little as he started to reply. Before he could, however, she sent another message. “I wish someone could explain the lesson to me!”

The two regularly would go to a small cafe tucked away in a back ally nearby UA, it was a mix between a cat cafe and a used book store. There are indirect translations through the characters don't worry
Knowledge of Metro 2033 not required to read this AU (Everything is explained)
summary: It is the year 2033 in Moscow's post-apocalyptic metro system, and Izuku Midoriya has nothing to do but do his boring and repetitive task of cataloging books everyday. When an opportunity-slash-death wish to go to the surface is given by his boss, he sees a chance to escape the boredom of Polis Station. And during his trip to the surface, his mission goes south as a certain ash-blonde goes to rain on his parade, which leads to even more predicaments and complexities concerning his supposedly simple mission and with said ash-blonde.Follow Izuku on his unpredictable journey throughout the remnants of the Moscow Metro and the Dead City itself, while simultaneously deciphering the explosive yet familiar-looking ash blonde.(Basically, this is an AU set in post-apocalyptic Moscow's metro system, based on the universe of the video game and book, Metro 2033. Expect elements of fluff, angst, action, and smut. Perhaps a bit of scary stuff, too.)

warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: Not a single UA student would be surprised to learn Sero and Kaminari dedicated an entire 24 hours a year to wasting money on whatever they possibly could. Their record for the most amount of money spent in the time period was set, infamously, on their first year at UA. Against better judgement, they ordered one portable pool, two bouncy houses, four bands, and five unlucky horse to arrive at the UA gates at the same time. The amount of students that simply walked past the crowd of musicians and horses without a second glance was both alarming and hilarious.Well, it was hilarious to Kaminari and Sero, as they relaxed nearby on bright pink pool floaties. Afterwards, the teachers set some limitations on what students had affectionately named “Kaminari and Sero’s date night”. There had never been an instance similar to that day since, and most of the students and faculty were in a constant state of anticipation. The second date night had passed almost without incident, despite the excitement buzzing throughout the school.Basically Kaminari and Sero hanging out and falling in love plus pining Sero

summary: Tooru has had dreams about her other lives for as long as she can remember. Even before she got her quirk. She has been a dowager queen, a goze, an assassin, a foster mother... She often loses track of all the lives she's lived. None are similar, all of them vastly different and equally alluring. Sometimes it's like she leads a double life. Masquerading as a different woman every night while returning to the current life of a bubbly, infectious, invisible girl by day.Like all her other lives, this one is different. Even more so than what she has come to expect. The girl hopes against hope that a new universe ushers in a new fate.

title: My True Hero
author: AnimeCorazon1997
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: Deep in Will’s Flame Mountain were bottomless abysses, occasional mountain wyverns, and the prophet known as Fortuna who could see into the near future and knew all. Legend has it that Endeavor or better known as Enji Todoroki, the Cruel Fiery King, imprisoned Fortuna for her prophecy of a hero that hailed from Ei to change all of Yu to appear and free the land from his reign. Once exterminating the beautiful land of Ei, Endeavor set his wrath onto her next.  After having the poor thing experience torture and had her left hand burned from his flames, Endeavor whisked her away deep into the mountains of Yu, never to see the light again.“So we are going on a trail based on a tale? Please tell me you’re joking, Your Highness,” A woman dressed in gladiator armor with her high spikey tipped black ponytail, crossed her arms with a brow raised in disbelief at her master who was saddling himself onto his white horse.“Momo, we aren’t in that dreaded place anymore, so calling me Shouto is fine. Why would I be joking on something like that? It would be one of the things that bastard would do.”

summary: He’s seen enough nature documentaries to have a vague understanding of what to do. So he stops moving and lets Bakugou sniff at him. He starts at his neck, nosing around his jugular before dragging his tongue along the skin. It’s a brief contact but his tongue is rougher than usual and the feeling is electric. Eijirou shivers, a whine trapped in his throat, but otherwise keeps still and the blond shifts to move further down until he’s settled between his spread thighs. It’s at this point that Eijirou realizes he never finished those documentaries because Bakugou’s sniffing around his dick and they never covered  that  in National Geographic.  In which Kirishima becomes an expert in wolf behavior overnight and still isn't prepared for the real thing.

summary: Midoriya woke up to the sound of light rain pattering against the window. Lazily he rolled himself onto his back and rubbed his eyes before he glanced at the clock. 10 am. Bakugou was at work by now. But he had the day off. So he had their apartment all for himself. He snuggled down into the pillows and pulled the blanket further over him again. If he just stayed a few more moments in bed then that would be fine. He grabbed his phone and checked it for some messages, but the only one he had gotten was from Ochaco and Kacchan. He opened Kacchan´s first.> Morning Nerd! It´s raining so put on a coat if you go out. Be back around 5 pm. Take care of yourself.<Midoriya chuckled to himself and texting a quick reply> Thank you Kacchan, will be. Love you.<

summary: Hizashi Yamada never felt at home in his house. His parents fought constantly and his father would get abusive while his mother would go out with other men, not to mention that both had a drinking problem. Sometimes, his parents would take it out on him, causing him to be forced to go to school with bruises. Without getting help from anybody, Hizashi feels alone. He hopes that he could gather up the courage to run away and run from his problems.Shouta Aizawa is an orphaned child living in a terrible orphanage in a bad part of the town. His reputation isn't good at all, known for breaking laws and selling drugs for money. Everybody stays away from him, people advise others to never go near him as he is "bad luck".What if these two crossed paths? If these two troubled boys simply ran away from there problems together? Would a romance form or would it be a big mistake?

summary: Guilt is only one of a multitude of emotions that run rampant behind the ever present anger Katsuki holds onto like a lifeline. It’s what he knows, what’s safe and easy. There’s something soft developing and he fights to squash it like a fucking bug because there’s nothing soft about him. He’s built to fight, built to win, but when he thinks about Kirishima, he thinks about his hands and how easily he’d melt beneath them. He reminds his heart who’s in fucking charge and shrugs out from under Kirishima’s hand the next time it lands unthinkingly on his shoulder, an apologetic smile following the sound of his palm as it thuds back against his thigh.

summary: Izuku Midoryia has dreamed of being a knight since he was a child, listening to the legends of All Might and his battles with the Northern monsters since he was born. However, countless knights have told him and his family that they are not rich enough, that they don't have enough talent, to let Izuku become a knight. Not as easily discouraged as that, when he turns 16, Izuku sets out from his valley-town of Kilead to find a master to show him the ways of chivalry. He's accompanied by a knight, an aspiring magician, and a runaway prince on his journey.Yet, things go wrong, and the four are lost in the Dark Forest in the middle of winter, which borders the Dragon's Spine mountain range. The Spines are the most dangerous place in their world. With Wildings and Dragons and other monstrous creatures lurk in the dark, will the four be able to survive? Even when a handsome stranger (who rides a dragon), comes to "take them prisoner"? Wait, does Izuku know him?!_________Hello! Chapter names will change, as well as probably the name of this work. Stay tuned for it!

summary: “Um, well…” Midoriya’s eyes wandered off to the side again. He lowered his voice. “Um, Kacchan… he… took your table.”Uraraka blinked for a moment, letting his words sink in. She slowly turned on her heel to inspect his claim and found that, indeed, a certain blonde was sitting at her table. There were plenty of tables open but that one was her’s. It had the perfect view of the outdoors and it had the best lighting for studying. She was sure Bakugou had taken the table out of spite, reminded of all the times that they raced to the shop in the past to beat one another to this specific table.Now it was a full out war.

summary: Bakugou eyes the jumper again. It’s a deep evergreen colour, with a red and white trim around the neck and sleeves. There’s a faint candycane pattern that runs up the length of the arms, and had it stopped at that, Bakugou would have had no qualms – okay, maybe a few – about wearing it. However, as it stands, there is a giant plush toy wreath stitched onto the stomach of the jumper, personified with caricature angry eyes and a frowning mouth; the phrase, ‘FEEL MY WREATH’, printed in block letters above it. Shaking his head again, Bakugou says, “Did you finally bust a fuse? It’s not happening, Sparky, not a fucking chance.”*** Kaminari and Kirishima love ugly Christmas jumpers. Bakugou on the other hand? Not so much.

Bakugou looks up at Todoroki with a withering gaze. “Do you expect me to say something like, oh yeah, I’ve come to love you with all the capacity in my withered fucking heart, sweetie? Because I really hope not.”    “I mean,” Todoroki says, “I didn’t anticipate my life ever taking this turn, but I do love you, so I kind of hope to have the sentiment returned?”    “This is the most embarrassing conversation I’ve had in my entire life and you should be grateful I wasn’t fucking outta here like ten minutes ago,” Bakugou says, getting up so fast that Todoroki wonders if he’s experiencing physical whiplash. Todoroki notes that the tips of Bakugou's ears seem to be turning an impressive shade of red.

summary: No one had known about them. For how could they understand? A match made in hell, they’d say. He was known as his biggest bully, after all. The years of abuse and humiliation, how could love ever spark from anything like that, right? How could they have ever accepted them for what they were?The endless nights of staying in each others’ dorm rooms and discussing combat techniques, watching stupid scary movies, and sneaking kisses in during the “scary” parts.Those were all just memories now.

summary: This sweater though, this tight black one that Bakugou had just spilt his drink on, this one was new. It clung to his figure brilliantly, whilst somehow still looking modest. The fabric came up to hug at Todoroki’s neck, the material there folding over itself and sitting perfectly against his skin, the black accentuating his already striking features. He looked mature, like he had come straight from an expensive, exclusive photography exhibition. Maybe he had. Todoroki Shouto looked like he had been born to wear this outfit. Bakugou thinks he might have a more positive outlook on college parties after ending up with Todoroki Shouto in his bed.

summary:
“Um, hey, Bakugou,” Kirishima says, “did I interrupt anything? I didn't mean to, I can go back—” Bakugou grabs his arm. “You’re not gonna leave me alone with this fucker, are you?” he asks, gesturing towards Deku. Kirishima’s face lights up. “Well, if that's what you want,” he teases.  
  “Just come on,” Bakugou says, hurrying down the stairs, “I have to stop Deku from fucking this up.”

  He meets Deku at the front of the stairs.

  “Hey, Kirishima,” Deku greets. At least he knows how to be fucking cool for a second.

  “Hey!” Kirishima says.

  “I—” Deku yawns unconvincingly, making a big show out of stretching his arms. “Would you look at the time? I think I'm gonna sleep. See you!”

  And then he fucking winks as he leaves.

  Bakugou wants to blow the stairs up. He takes everything back. Deku's a piece of shit who will never be cool. 
bakugou hates christmas for very justifiable reasons, and kirishima is determined to set it right. they're also awkward idiots trying to figure out first loves. deku is a useless bisexual.

summary: It's evening when Kirishima enters the apartment through the front door. Bakugou is sitting on the couch reading the latest hero news on his phone, and Kaminari is rummaging around somewhere in the kitchen."Honey, I'm back!" Kirishima announces as a joke, never one for much subtlety. He and Kaminari make eye contact, their laughter barely contained. “Welcome home," Bakugou responds without missing a beat, gaze never leaving his phone. Behind him, Kaminari gapes at Kirishima. Bakugou realizes his mistake a moment later when Kirishima turns on him with big eyes.(Bakugou, Kaminari, and Kirishima stumble into adulthood and each other through sharing an apartment— snapshots of their life together after graduation.)

summary: “I don’t want to kill you.” Izuku’s voice is wracked with sobs that cut off his words like they’re not meant to be. They’re the type of sobs that build up, catch your throat in their hands, and tighten their grip, so that every word comes chokes out and desperate. He’s desperate to say something, because they both can feel the seconds ticking away— precious seconds with each other before, hopefully, their double deaths. That’s what matters to them, though. Staying together.--In their last moments, what matters to Shouto and Izuku is holding onto each other.

“It’s not about need,” she says as she takes Kirishima’s arm. She drags her over to the nearest mirror then steps behind her. “Sometimes you just want something because it’s nice and it makes you feel good.” She wraps her arms around Kirishima’s middle to hold the bra up to her chest. “See?” Mina whispers and her breath fans out along Kirishima’s cheek. It smells like candy. “You fill it out so nicely.” 
    
  Kirishima and Mina go shopping together but the fitting rooms aren't only for trying on clothes.

title: snapshots

fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
relationships: Aizawa Shouta | Eraserhead/Yagi Toshinori | All Might
summary: It’s quiet when Shouta wakes up.He blinks, a bit disoriented for a second, before taking in the room around him. It isn’t his—it’s a bit sparse, a large desk taking up most of the space filled with papers and pencils. Sunlight is streaming in through a nearby window.His head aches, and Shouta groans, flopping back onto the pillow. This is why I shouldn’t drink, he thinks wryly. He tilts his head towards the bedside table and finds a glass of water with an aspirin tablet next to it. On the glass, there’s a sticky note with a messily drawn smiley face and a heart. Shouta rolls his eyes and rips it off before gulping down the pill.He keeps the sticky note in his pocket.-A winter morning Toshinori and Shouta spend together making breakfast, interspersed with snapshots of life before they were together.

author: Doeeerie (doeeerie)
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
tags: Take it from my dead cold hands
summary: So Todoroki smelled like walking a crisp evergreen forest in the dead of winter with a fresh blanket of snow on the ground. Midoriya had found himself throughout the night inhaling more and more to get a better feel for the others scent. He knew it could have been quirk related, which was possible, but he highly doubted it. Instead it was more likely that Todoroki used a cedar or fresh pine scented body wash. Which wasn’t unlikely he doubted Todoroki would be one for heavily scented strong body washes.All Midoriya knew was that it was addicting and made him long for home around the holiday’s with his mom. It was also so purely appropriate for who Todoroki was as a person that he found himself smiling that night as he’d gone to bed. And maybe that was what had started it. The scent of home lingering around Todoroki, or just the idea that Todoroki had let him of all people touch and be close to him.But ever since, Midoriya couldn’t focus. He was thoroughly distracted. And maybe that was why he kept getting into more and more… compromising positions. Or Todoroki Shouto smells like home, and Midoriya Izuku has feelings.

title: Nightmares to Dreams
author: rememberednoah
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary: When Midoriya went to bed that night, his thoughts were only on how he planned to propose to the man he loved. This, however, was not a distressing thought for the hero. He slept soundly because he trusted that, regardless of how he proposed, Todoroki would say yes. He felt it in his bones, in his very blood, and in the expanse of his soul. The thought of proposing was comforting to Midoriya. His dreams, although powered by the jitters over the proposal, were soothing. They kept his smile in place as he slept. OrIn which Midoriya proposes to Todoroki while he's half-asleep.

On the back of his hand, Izuku’s ring finger leads to the deepest shade of pink he has ever seen. It’s almost red, but a small wall of white holds it back from being so. When he flips his hand over to inspect his palm, the red fades into the lightest shade of pink Izuku can recall, struggling to keep white. He doesn’t know what the colours mean, because no one’s ever really seen a band like his own.So, he’s a freak in two ways."-Sometimes, Izuku's thoughts get the better of him. title: Let Us Be Young
author: Inrainbowz
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
summary:
Had he been told about this place back when he was in UA, or after, at the factory, Shoto wouldn’t have believed it existed. He didn’t know people could be like that with each other. Caring, protective, kind. He didn’t know they could make each other laugh, comfort each other when they were sad or hurt. He didn’t know that being around others could be so warm.

  It didn’t change the fact that he was living his days in mild confusion and that he didn’t get half of what was happening around him. 
After being rescued, Shoto has a lot to discover about the worlds, others, and himself. (Part 4 of that Dystopian AU where the most useful Quirk users are enslaved to contribute to society, and Izuku decides to save them all)

title: Flower Food
author: MasterOfBread
fandoms: 僕のヒーローアカデミア | Boku no Hero Academia | My Hero Academia
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary: He thought that he was finally over it. But there was still this bitter feeling of agony that remained in his heart, triggered by Bakugou’s previously cold statement. Fat, warm tears trekked down his face, half expecting to feel that familiar burn in his throat before coughing up soft flower petals. However, the only pain he felt was in his chest. The romantic feelings he previously held may have wilted, but the pain of losing a close friend was still very much there. He didn’t know how to handle it, choked sobs slipping past his lips into the empty bathroom. He looked back, desperately trying to figure out why Bakugou had abandoned their friendship so easily. Why Bakugou insisted on looking at him like the way he looked at the dirt under his nails. Why-"Izuku?"

The pairing process, in case you were wondering, is literally what it sounds like.  It’s a worldwide procedure, in which, high schoolers are paired with other high schoolers to ensure that all the Earth’s peoples had a future mate and/or lover with whom they could be eternally happy.

summary: In the past, werewolves used to live among people, more or less. But then a few hunting groups figured out how much their pelts or so called 'magical blood' could go for, and the creatures were reduced to nothing more than a myth.Or were they?Midoriya is a werewolf, and has been told to hide this fact from everyone his whole life. Only problem is, he wants to run in the wild with the other wolves. Wants to live in the forest.Kirishima has been told that werewolves and humans could never get along for most of his life. After all, his old pack was once almost killed off by humans. So when he finds a human that he cares about, loves even, he struggles between two things: what he has always been told, and what he now believes.

summary: Himiko Toga is a member of the League of Villains, the organization who has changed the world irreparably. She is flaunted as a "cute highschool girl", but the fangs in her mouth and creepy smile on her face say otherwise. You are a normal citizen, trying to get by with your odd quirk and loner traits. See, you've never stood out, but you can't help feel a bit special when you come face to face with the member of the organization, Himiko Toga. At first her willingness to shed your blood was life threatening, but after she sees your quirk, she can't help but want to keep you all to herself.  How will this abnormal, unhealthy relationship pan out? And how crazy of a girl can you love? Find out.

Sometimes Shouto allows himself to forget.
On the brisk winter mornings, when everything is frozen and still, when he’s spent the morning wrapped in blankets and sitting in the comfortable warmth of his room. He’ll allow himself to forget about the scar tissue marring his face and he’ll forget to adjust his body temperature.
And it stings.

summary: This is a series about characters who are rejected from popular franchises and series and have to find other means of being franchised. Some clever folk thought of Reject Academy, a school to help people be franchised. Every original Reject Academy character is inspired by one of the series in the fandom tags! This also features other characters of mine from various games in the making such as The Steve Series, Project Plummet, etc. It also features Flagman, who's game happens to already be made. The story has a lot of potential to grow and blossom and I'm excited to see if I get any feedback for it!

Both their stories should have been over before they even begun.Was it fate, karma, or just dumb luck, they would never know. As it was, it should have ended that day, and instead, it all began. 
Growing up in a dark world, with dark people and a dark Quirk, Hitoshi is saved more than once before he gets to save others. (Part 3 of that Dystopian AU where the most useful Quirk users are enslaved to contribute to society, and Izuku decides to save them all)
